product.name: ArDoku
product.familyDescriptorPl: Laminaty 3-warstwowe z membraną TPU — wodoodporne, oddychające
product.categorySourceGroup: 3 Layer (woven fabric + TPU Membrane + knit Fabric) laminated fabrics.
product.specLine: 300 g/m², 84% Polyester 10% Pu 6% Elastane, 3 layer laminated, Softshell Fabric
descriptions: ArDoku is 84% polyester 10% pu 6% elastane softshell fabric. The top layer is elastic woven fabric, the middle layer is breathable tpu membrane, and the last layer is polar fabric.
The basic usage is for winter jackets.
ArDoku is certified for EN 343 and EN 20471
300 g/m², 84% Polyester 10% Pu 6% Elastane, 3 layer laminated, Softshell Fabric
technicalParameters: Fiber | 84% Polyester (PES) 10% Polyurethane (PU) 6% Elastane (EL) | EN ISO 2076
Tensile Strength | Warp > 1000N ; Weft > 800N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp > 40N ; Weft > 35N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

evidence: descriptions: ArDoku is certified for EN 343 and EN 20471
acceptedMatches.rationale: Explicit certification to EN ISO 20471 high-visibility standard and 'hi-vis' property directly support high-visibility apparel classification.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: No explicit statement of electric-arc protection, high-voltage work or EMI shielding; only generic winter jacket use is stated.
EN 343 relates to protection against rain/weather for professional use, not firefighting; no explicit firefighting or turnout gear mention.

evidence: descriptions: ArDoku is certified for EN 343 and EN 20471
primary.rationale: Explicit EN ISO 20471 certification and hi-vis property make certified high-visibility apparel the clearest and most direct end use.

evidence: descriptions: The basic usage is for winter jackets.
secondary.rationale: The product is explicitly positioned as a softshell fabric for winter jackets with EN 343 weather protection, supporting a secondary outdoor/functional apparel use independent of the hi-vis certification.

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: EN 343 and winter jacket use are more specifically outdoor/functional than generic industrial workwear; hi-vis is already the dominant certified use.
No explicit statement of electrical/energy sector use; only hi-vis and weather protection stated.
EN 343 pertains to rain/cold protection for professional use, not firefighting; no explicit turnout gear reference.
